# ci/cd: extend dependabot config by labels and remove oldname

**Motivation:** use predefined labels instead of vendoring.

Details are here https://docs.github.com/en/code-security/dependabot/dependabot-version-updates/configuration-options-for-the-dependabot.yml-file#labels.
